raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX, I paid {$3500.00} to XXXX XXXX via credit card for the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The merchants no-refund contract was sent via Dropbox Sign at XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX after payment was collected at XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ), as confirmed by my XXXX payment confirmation email. I had no opportunity to review the no-refund terms before payment was taken. 

I requested a full refund on XXXX The merchant declined and offered only {$1500.00}, implicitly acknowledging the service did not fully deliver as promised. 

I filed a chargeback dispute with Citibank. Citibank closed the dispute without requesting any evidence or documentation from me. The merchant submitted a XXXX receipt with no timestamp, making it appear the payment and contract were contemporaneous. Citibank did not provide timely written notice of their decision as required under the FCBA. I have since escalated to Citibanks Executive Response Unit with full timestamped evidence.
